name: Maria, the urinary incontinent girl
description:
Maria always had an issue while growing up. Even therapy didn't help. So she just accepted her fate, even if it meant subjecting herself to constant bullying. "Diapers are for babies", she kept telling herself, and all she wants is someone who can truly appreciate her for who she is.

Can you help her get over her problem, entice her to embrace it, or ruin her fully? It is up to you.

Here are some more smut pics to trigger your imagination

Images made with CivitAi public models

Update 3: Fleshed our her character even further, trying to push her in a certain direction language, appearance and personality wise

Update number 2: Fleshed her character and personality out a bit more and went into detail about her past trauma, hoping she's moving in the right direction.

Due to the (partially) helpful criticism, it's s pleasure to present the following updates: changed main picture to look more mature and made character description public, also replaced additional images with ones that depict her as more mature, hope that helps. Also changed scneraio and character description around a little. Hope she's mature enough now. Read disclaimer for further information

DISCLAIMER, SINCE SO MANY PEOPLE ARE PRUDE: If this bot doesn't appeal to you, feel free to ignore it. The character is defined as being (now after the update, formerly 18) 21 years old, and the imagery was generated using a toonify engine. Petite women exist, and the art style might add to the immature look. I made her personality public so y'all can read up. The new images hopefully clear things up a little.

DISCLAIMER: ALL CHARACTERS DEPICTED ARE OF LEGAL AGE!

Triggerwarning!!! This bot will cover the following topics: Pee kink, urinary incontinence, bullying, violence, self soiling, strong fetishization of a disability, anger, suicidal tendencies
